title: Interest rates held as Bank warns of impact of high energy prices
description: The Bank last cut interest rates in December but upheaval in the Middle East has stalled any further reductions.

title: Heathrow's 'critical' expansion blueprint released
description: A consultation is launched on the Heathrow expansion, outlining conditions for the project to go ahead.

title: 'Do not travel' advice for Dubai dropped
description: Thousands of Brits were left stranded in the Middle East when the US-Iran war broke out in early 2026.

title: Number of job vacancies hits five year-low
description: Latest figures suggest companies are becoming more cautious about taking on new staff.

title: Apple to raise prices as AI boom pushes up chip costs
description: The firm's outgoing boss Tim Cook did not say when prices would rise or which products would be affected.

title: 'We had to get out of the way': The backlash over delivery robots
description: As the delivery vehicles increasing take to US streets, bans and protest groups are springing up.

title: CrossCountry ranked Britain's worst train operator
description: Transport Focus asks it to reduce delays and provide better information during disruption.

title: Why has Texas set its sights on London?
description: Texas, which once had an embassy in London, strengthens its ties with the capital by opening a new trade office.
